sbom.name: VS3 Tool Registry Sample Pack SBOM

native_cli_commands: cornerstone pack activate pack_vs3_tool_registry_sample --dry-run --grant artifact.read --grant tool.local.evaluate --grant connector.mock.read --state-dir reports/runtime/vs3-tool-registry-state --json

proof_boundary.notes: This proof uses deterministic local Agent Pack and tool-package fixtures. It is not production registry, real WASM runtime isolation, live provider, penetration-test, or human security acceptance evidence.

certification.intended_use: Local VS3 tool registry and sandbox verification.

role_card.summary: Runs a local deterministic evidence check inside declared sandbox grants.

cannot_do: write memory, policy, or actions outside explicit activation grants

diff.migration_notes: no data migration; owner can test update before approval

older package version after newer pin exists
registry revocation list contains package subject
